overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking along a dirt path through rural farmland. The character travels past wheat fields, wooden fences, and haystacks while approaching a village decorated with red banner arches. The scene features high-quality game engine rendering with natural lighting and detailed medieval rural architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural farmland path between wheat fields

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the dirt path toward the red banner arches in the distance

entered.detail: winding dirt trail with patches of grass and small rocks
rustic wooden post fence lining the right side of the path
traditional conical haystack made of dried straw
wooden archway decorated with hanging red triangular pennant banners
golden wheat crops stretching to the tree line
tall wooden pole with multiple lantern fixtures

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a serene rural landscape with Geralt walking along a dirt path bordered by wooden fences and golden wheat fields. Red decorative banner arches stand in the distance against a partly cloudy sky, while haystacks dot the farmland to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: field path passing under decorative banner structures

events.description: flock of black birds flies overhead from left to right across the sky

agents.ego_description: Geralt continues walking forward, passing under the first set of red banners while birds fly overhead

notable_agents.action: flock of birds flying across the sky from left to right

entered.detail: cluster of medieval-style buildings with sloped roofs visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: Geralt passes under the wooden archway with red pennant banners as the path continues through open fields. A flock of birds flies overhead, and distant village buildings become visible on the horizon beyond the wheat fields.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching village entrance with stone walls

events.description: wooden fence on left transitions to stacked stone wall as path approaches village

agents.ego_description: Geralt walks along the curving path as the landscape shifts to stone walls and village structures appear ahead

entered.detail: low stacked stone wall replacing the wooden fence along the left side of the path
timber-framed houses and structures of the village becoming more prominent
abandoned wooden wagon or cart visible behind the stone wall

segments.scene_description: The path curves toward the village as wooden fences give way to rustic stone walls on the left. Haystacks appear behind the wall, and a wooden cart is visible in the fields. The village buildings grow larger and more detailed as Geralt approaches the settlement entrance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a serene rural landscape that gradually transitions into the outskirts of a rustic village. It begins with Geralt walking along a dirt path bordered by wooden fences and golden wheat fields, with red decorative banner arches visible in the distance under a partly cloudy sky. As he moves forward, the camera follows him passing under one of the red pennant archways while a flock of birds flies overhead and village buildings emerge on the horizon. The scene then shifts as the path curves, with the wooden fences giving way to rustic stone walls and a wooden cart appearing in the fields. Finally, the village buildings grow larger and more detailed as the camera approaches the settlement entrance.
